problem_solved: Fragmented patient and healthcare provider relationships in life sciences commercial
solution_description: CRM platform for healthcare and life sciences with patient 360, provider engagement, and field team tools. Part of Salesforce Customer 360. Integrates with Veeva for pharma.
notes: Horizontal CRM with life sciences vertical. Competes with Veeva CRM, IQVIA OCE. Less pharma-specific than Veeva but broader platform. Veeva originally built on Salesforce.
